---
title: "Reviewing the impact of Facebook on civic participation: The mediating role of algorithmic curation and platform affordances"
author: "Papa, V., and Ioannides, N."
date: 2023-01-01
description: "Journal of Communication Review. doi: 10.1080/10714421.2023.2186680"
categories: [Media and Social Media Monitoring]
image: images_publications/journal-article.png
---
